description_long: This is a contemporary two-seater sofa upholstered in smooth, rich brown leather, featuring a gently rounded and enveloping silhouette. The seat and backrest are seamlessly integrated, creating a plush, inviting appearance with subtle horizontal seam lines visible on the back. The armrests are wide, curved, and rise to the same height as the backrest, providing a cocoon-like comfort. The sofa is supported by four slender, black metal legs, two at the front corners and two at the rear, with an additional central support for stability. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with no visible buttons, tufting, or decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and comfort. This piece would suit urban environments such as lobbies, parks, or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, brown leather two-seater sofa with rounded arms and back, supported by slim black metal legs. Its smooth, seamless upholstery and minimalist design create a cozy, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's wide, curved arms and backrest, with a smooth, uninterrupted leather surface and slim black legs visible at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's deep seat, rounded armrest, and the gentle curve of the backrest, with two slender legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, slightly curved backrest with a central seam and the four black metal legs, emphasizing the sofa's solid, enclosed form.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the rounded armrest, deep seat, and the sofa's overall plush profile with two visible legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushion, both attached and uniform in size, with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, wide, and smoothly curved, rising to the same height as the backrest with a rounded profile and fully upholstered in leather.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners, with an additional central support; legs are straight, exposed, and minimalistic in style.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is medium height, continuous, and gently curved, seamlessly integrated with the armrests and seat, with no segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid brown leather with a smooth texture and subtle seam lines, no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
